headline: A Look At Disney (DIS) Valuation As Shares Struggle And Streaming And Experiences Drive New Growth Hopes
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Walt Disney (DIS) stock has been under pressure recently, with the share price down 1.4% on the day, 1.8% over the past week, and about 1.6% over the past month. Over the past year, the stock has declined about 9.7%, with year to date performance down roughly 9.3%. The past five years have been more challenging, with total return lower by about 41.1%. Against that share performance, Walt Disney operates a broad entertainment business across three...
